chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No.134 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing of case 1. For hearing of CMA No.776 of 2015 [Limitation] 2. For hearing of CMA No.777 of 2015 [Exemption Application] 3. For hearing of main case 05.05.2025 Mr. Noor Nabi, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Qaim Ali Memon, Advocate for Applicant Mr. Haider Naqi, Advocate for Respondent ************ On the last date of hearing, following Order was passed_ “Counsel for applicant called absent. No intimation is received. Learned Counsel for Respondent submits that instant reference application is time barred and has also been filed an inappropriate office, therefore, the same is liable to be dismissed on this account. Let him file subject objections in writing with advance copy to learned counsel for the applicant so that he may be provided an opportunity to assist this Court with regard to aforesaid objections raised by learned counsel for the respondent. Adjourned, to be fixed in the second week of November, 2017.” Today, Counsel is not available to assist the Court. Matter is pending since, 2015, which is also against on State-owned enterprises. Be that as it may, Counsel has failed to assist the Court as to the objections, noted hereinabove. This Reference Application is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
